commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an initial DM-policy prompt value in legacy onboarding code and also changes gateway security paths, channel plugins, dependencies, lockfile, tests, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. for the configure path by source inspection: current main reaches the DM-policy select prompt and reads the existing policy only after selection. No for the update path; the inspected update wizard does not invoke configure/channel setup.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer/security handling is needed because the PR lacks contributor real behavior proof and mixes unrelated security-sensitive changes; automation should not repair or merge this branch.

target.title: fix(security): preserve dmPolicy settings during wizard runs
target.author: ethanhunter1229
